query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'reservations' AND ORDINAL_POSITION > 40 ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rp6zCMfN7Vv5FK.root --database AV298FS8t5SaTurBBRqhgQ --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'reservations' AND ORDINAL_POSITION > 40 ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
